Please Note

Rolling Stock Certificate (RSC) is not available after 31.12.2022 on this website due to as per Railway Board letter no-2014/M(C)/141-CMM-I dt-12.07.2022   the Standard Rolling Stock Certificate (SRSC) has been implemented in all PU’s from 01.08.2022 and the same is available on Production Monitoring System (PMS) portal and CMMS Portal.                     Url  id is https://prodmcf.indianrailways.gov.in/MCFRBL/ for PMS portal

and  https://roams.cris.org.in For CMMS   portal.

(This is approval by the competent authority)

headers: Please Note Rolling Stock Certificate (RSC) is not available after 31.12.2022 on this website due to as per Railway Board letter no-2014/M(C)/141-CMM-I dt-12.07.2022 the Standard Rolling Stock Certificate (SRSC) has been implemented in all PU’s from 01.08.2022 and the same is available on Production Monitoring System (PMS) portal and CMMS Portal. Url id is https://prodmcf.indianrailways.gov.in/MCFRBL/ for PMS portal and https://roams.cris.org.in For CMMS portal. (This is approval by the competent authority) this issue related letters
